creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I have a working patch for this now, however it is not as clean as it 
should be, so it would be great if you could contribute this to the 
audacity project, so it can be supported upstream and others may use 
these options, as well. 

Here is a link to submit to the audacity project: 
http://wiki.audacityteam.org/wiki/SubmittingPatches 

Feel free to mail me personally when this has been incorporated, and I 
can work this into the port. 

-jgh
